2603.18567.title: SpecForge: A Flexible and Efficient Open-Source Training Framework for Speculative Decoding
2603.18567.paper_summary: Large language models incur high inference latency due to sequential autoregressive decoding. Speculative decoding alleviates this bottleneck by using a lightweight draft model to propose multiple tokens for batched verification. However, its adoption has been limited by the lack of high-quality draft models and scalable training infrastructure. We introduce SpecForge, an open-source, production-oriented framework for training speculative decoding models with full support for EAGLE-3. SpecForge incorporates target-draft decoupling, hybrid parallelism, optimized training kernels, and integration with production-grade inference engines, enabling up to 9.9x faster EAGLE-3 training for Qwen3-235B-A22B. In addition, we release SpecBundle, a suite of production-grade EAGLE-3 draft models trained with SpecForge for mainstream open-source LLMs. Through a systematic study of speculative decoding training recipes, SpecBundle addresses the scarcity of high-quality drafts in the community, and our draft models achieve up to 4.48x end-to-end inference speedup on SGLang, establishing SpecForge as a practical foundation for real-world speculative decoding deployment.
2603.18567.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型因為序列自回歸解碼而產生高推理延遲。<lb/>推測解碼通過使用輕量級草稿模型提出多個標記以進行批量驗證，緩解了這一瓶頸。<lb/>然而，由於缺乏高質量的草稿模型和可擴展的訓練基礎設施，其採用受到限制。<lb/>我們介紹了SpecForge，一個開源的、以生產為導向的框架，用於訓練推測解碼模型，並全面支持EAGLE-3。<lb/>SpecForge結合了目標草稿解耦、混合並行、優化的訓練內核以及與生產級推理引擎的整合，使得Qwen3-235B-A22B的EAGLE-3訓練速度提高了最多9.9倍。<lb/>此外，我們發布了SpecBundle，一套使用SpecForge訓練的生產級EAGLE-3草稿模型，適用於主流開源LLM。<lb/>通過對推測解碼訓練配方的系統研究，SpecBundle解決了社區中高質量草稿的稀缺問題，我們的草稿模型在SGLang上實現了最多4.48倍的端到端推理加速，確立了SpecForge作為現實世界推測解碼部署的實用基礎。
2603.18567.author: Shenggui Li et.al.
2603.18567.authors: Shenggui Li, Chao Wang, Yikai Zhu, Yubo Wang, Fan Yin, Shuai Shi, Yefei Chen, Xiaomin Dong, Qiaoling Chen, Jin Pan, Ji Li, Laixin Xie, Yineng Zhang, Lei Yu, Yonggang Wen, Ivor Tsang, Tianwei Zhang
